questions.statement: In which state of India is shifting cultivation known as &lsquo;Bringa&rsquo;?
Summer solstice in Northern Hemisphere occurs on which date of the year?
questions.explanation: The summer solstice occurs on June 21 in the Northern Hemisphere&nbsp;and occur 22 December each year in the Southern Hemisphere.&nbsp;The same dates in the opposite hemisphere are referred to as the&nbsp;winter solstice.
